inputDomain: Finite matrices / vectors over Q with nonzero denominators
outputRelation: Witness relations (inverse, system solution, kernel, det identity)
termination: Finite matrix dimension within capability limits
representationRefinement: MatrixExpr IR → evaluated Rat matrices → witness predicates
performanceNotes: Witness checking is O(n^3)-class matrix multiply for inverses; reported separately from correctness.
knownLimitations: Does not verify external BLAS or CAS matrix routines.
